cancel_date.text: วันที่ยกเลิก

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (money_type_id) order by tab.sort_order ,tab.receipt_date ,tab.receipt_no ,tab.sort_group_item) as rowno ,( case tab.group_item when 'LCC' then 'ค่าปรับเงินกู้' else tab.description end ) as case_item_type_name,tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( partition by (sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id) order by sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item ) ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no as receipt_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) as sort_group_item ,to_tdate(sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date) as tdate_cancel_date ,to_tdate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date) as tdate_receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status as receipt_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item ,case when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISP' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description else sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name end as description
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id as entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_id as cancel_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order as sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name as money_type_name
,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '1' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , 0 ) as principal_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '1' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount , 0 ) as interest_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '1' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount , 0 ) as item_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.ppm_status as ppm_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.keep_monthly as keep_monthly , decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as loan_type
,sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_return ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_resaon
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) ) and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_id and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date between '01/01/2020' and '20/05/2020' --and si_security_user.user_id = 'fin20' )tab
